evidence: Initialized durable Ultragoal ledger for desktop v0.1 release setup.
Updated package versions to 0.1.0, configured macOS universal dmg/zip, Windows msi/zip, Linux AppImage/deb/tar.gz, added macOS entitlements, and smoke-tested Linux tar.gz packaging.
Added .github/workflows/desktop-release.yml with quality, Linux, Windows, macOS, and draft release jobs triggered by workflow_dispatch and v* tags.
Updated docs/development/electron-desktop.md with CI release behavior, target artifacts, unsigned Windows status, and macOS secret names.
gh secret list for zorid-app/Zorid shows all required Apple signing and notarization secret names.

Final v0.1 workflow run 27391571347 passed release contract, quality, Linux, Windows, macOS, and draft release jobs; draft release contains Linux AppImage/deb/tar.gz, unsigned Windows msi/zip, and signed macOS universal dmg/zip artifacts.
